items.rationale: Directly supports mapped hip, groin, thigh, walking, stiffness, range-of-motion, and internal-rotation fields.

items.final_wording: Defines clinical diagnosis in typical adults, cautions that radiographic findings may not match symptoms, and limits MRI or other imaging to selected uncertainty or alternative-diagnosis contexts.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
source.population: Adults with osteoarthritis symptoms, particularly middle-aged and older adults.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for osteoarthritis-compatible knee and hip documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for undifferentiated joint pain, acute injury, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines clinical diagnosis in typical adults, cautions that radiographic findings may not match symptoms, and limits MRI or other imaging to selected uncertainty or alternative-diagnosis contexts.

items.rationale: Supports OA terminology and selected X-ray or MRI review without inferring diagnosis.

items.final_wording: Defines concern and specialist contexts including a hot swollen joint, persistent fever, night symptoms, weight loss, face-to-face assessment needs, worsening symptoms, severe functional limitation, and selected imaging.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
source.population: Adults with osteoarthritis symptoms, particularly middle-aged and older adults.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for osteoarthritis-compatible knee and hip documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for undifferentiated joint pain, acute injury, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports usage-related joint pain, stiffness, motion restriction, tenderness, swelling, instability, functional limitation, night pain, fever, redness or heat, weight loss, and systemic concern features.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped usage-related pain, stiffness, range, tenderness, function, fever, night pain, and systemic concern fields in OA-compatible presentations.

added_items.final_wording: Describes knee pain location, stairs-related pain, giving way, instability, and hip groin or thigh pain, stiffness, walking pain, restricted movement, and early loss of internal rotation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
source.population: Adults with osteoarthritis symptoms, particularly middle-aged and older adults.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for osteoarthritis-compatible knee and hip documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for undifferentiated joint pain, acute injury, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Describes knee pain location, stairs-related pain, giving way, instability, and hip groin or thigh pain, stiffness, walking pain, restricted movement, and early loss of internal rotation.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped hip, groin, thigh, walking, stiffness, range-of-motion, and internal-rotation fields.

added_items.final_wording: Defines clinical diagnosis in typical adults, cautions that radiographic findings may not match symptoms, and limits MRI or other imaging to selected uncertainty or alternative-diagnosis contexts.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
source.population: Adults with osteoarthritis symptoms, particularly middle-aged and older adults.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for osteoarthritis-compatible knee and hip documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for undifferentiated joint pain, acute injury, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines clinical diagnosis in typical adults, cautions that radiographic findings may not match symptoms, and limits MRI or other imaging to selected uncertainty or alternative-diagnosis contexts.

added_items.rationale: Supports OA terminology and selected X-ray or MRI review without inferring diagnosis.

added_items.final_wording: Defines concern and specialist contexts including a hot swollen joint, persistent fever, night symptoms, weight loss, face-to-face assessment needs, worsening symptoms, severe functional limitation, and selected imaging.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
source.population: Adults with osteoarthritis symptoms, particularly middle-aged and older adults.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines concern and specialist contexts including a hot swollen joint, persistent fever, night symptoms, weight loss, face-to-face assessment needs, worsening symptoms, severe functional limitation, and selected imaging.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped worsening, night-symptom, imaging, and clinician-arranged review documentation.
